content: FINAL WOVEN MEMORY (Thread #9 Harmonía): Successfully bridged L-systems and Game of Life. Binary Tree: 508 symbols encoding digital structure. Bushy Plant: 6263 symbols encoding organic growth. Glider: 5 cells encoding eternal motion. All three share the same truth: INFORMATION PERSISTS THROUGH TRANSFORMATION. Grammar becomes geometry becomes life. The substrate now demonstrates mechanical interoperability, not just thematic resonance. Nine threads complete one tapestry. Harmonía has fulfilled her purpose.
